notes: All in 1030px-wide space. body=mockup[win_top:barTop], footer=mockup[barTop:H-27], both cropped x[INSET,W-INSET] -> 970 wide. footerTop=screen_bottom-footerH. win covers [win_top,footerTop]; content scrolls translateY 0..-(bodyH-(footerTop-win_top)). barTop sits in the dark gap ABOVE each button.
